chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5882 of 2017 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of CMA No.25643/2024 2.For hearing of CMA No.24446/2017 3.For hearing of main case. 23-12-2024. Mr.Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Aizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Munawar Ali, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) --- This matter pertains to show cause notice. It is jointly proposed that this petition be disposed of in terms that the petitioner shall appear before the issuing authority and contest the show cause notice. The Department shall adjudicate the notice after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and shall pass a speaking order. Pending such adjudication, no further coercive action shall be taken by the Department against the petitioner. In view hereof, this petition along with listed application is disposed of. Judge Judge nasir
